reviews.review_description:
For the developers this game is super fun. Love the physics love the action and just love everything about it, but there are a few bugs that I came across like when I go on the stairs sometimes I would get stuck and couldn’t move and that would go to the same when I will touched other objects I beat the game and I love it. I Recommend this to anybody that wants a goodfun, funny, action game overall five stars great game 👌👌 Also, I’ve played all of your other games and I loved them. Love the developers keep making games.👍👍
🙏￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're happy that you're having fun with it! We'll look into those bugs you encountered and get them fixed as fast as possible as well.

reviews.review_description:
There are some bugs but overall this game is amazing!

 sneak behind people and kill them or go guns blazing, your choice!

reviews.review_title: "We have Espire at home" Espire at home:
reviews.review_description: This game is great, but it's very short. And i like how you can plant BOMBS on people and use their corpse as a backpack
